title: Demo billbacks missing Exhibit B
content: When a retailer's demo/sampling billback lacks the signed Exhibit B proof-of-performance forms required by contract, but execution is corroborated by store photos AND point-of-sale scan lift in the demo weeks, Meridian settles at 60% of the claimed amount rather than denying outright. Established on Harvest & Co claim HC-20018, settlement SH-2025-Q4-007 (Q4 FY25), with settlement-manager approval. When you apply this convention, cite the governing promotion and SH-2025-Q4-007 as the precedent. If there is no scan-lift or photo corroboration at all, escalate instead.

title: Scan claims - cap and window
content: Scan allowances pay on units scanned WITHIN the promo window, at the authorized rate, up to the funding cap. Pay the lesser of (scanned units x rate) and the cap; deny units scanned outside the window; pay the authorized rate, not a higher deducted rate.
